name: Cabbage- Bulgur Stuffed
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the core from the cabbage and steam it until all leaves are soft and separate easily.
2. Sauté parsley, onions, celery, Italian seasoning, and garlic in an oil substitute until the onions are soft.
3. Add 30 oz of tomato sauce, 4 cups of water, and 2 cups of bulgur to the pan. Cook for about 1/2 hour over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until the bulgur is tender.
4. Remove from heat and prepare the cabbage leaves: place a spoonful of mixture in the center of each leaf.
5. Starting at one side, roll the leaf up and fold the ends under.
6. Place the stuffed cabbage leaves in a deep baking pan.
7. Mix 8 oz of tomato sauce with 1/2 cup of water and pour over the stuffed cabbage leaves to keep them moist during baking.
8. Bake at 375°F for about 30 minutes until the cabbage is hot.
Serving Size: 8
